Slowly, Then
All at Once
------------

Years ago, a mentor of mine took the time to extemporize about the theory o=
f
punctuated equilibrium, the concept in evolutionary biology (and since appl=
ied to politics and economics) that progress rarely occurs gradually, as we=
 expect, or hope, but rather in cacophonous fits and starts.=C2=A0

=C2=A0

Indeed, industries don=E2=80=99t really evolve in a piecemeal manner. Inste=
ad, there=E2=80=99s an awakening or disruptive technology=E2=80=94the print=
ing press, the Renaissance, the cotton
gin, Ford=E2=80=99s assembly line, the iPhone, Obama, Trump, ChatGPT=E2=80=
=94that catapults the culture forward, inevitably causing a series of rever=
berations. As Shakespeare knew well, there=E2=80=99s almost always an incit=
ing event that provokes the drama=E2=80=94or the markets=E2=80=94into actio=
n. That=E2=80=99s a truth we hold to be self-evident, and one of the many r=
easons we=E2=80=99ve derived our name from the bard. (For those just tuning=
 in, Puck is named after the mirthful narrating fairy in
A Midsummer Night=E2=80=99s Dream.) Anyway, without getting unnecessarily p=
hilosophical, the conversation crossed my mind amid a week replete with so =
many gyrations, oscillations, and conflagrations, from Silicon Valley to Wa=
shington, D.C.

=C2=A0

In her extraordinary debut at Puck, my newest partner, Leigh Ann Caldwell, =
delivered a pair of showstopping dispatches from
Trump=E2=80=99s Washington that captured the nonstop whiplash of, well, so =
many aspects of his dervish=E2=80=94the reversed O.M.B. freeze, the elongat=
ed nomination battle royales, and the attendant anxieties and animosities o=
f both his supplicants and foes on Capitol Hill. If you really want a flavo=
r of what=E2=80=99s going on in the nation=E2=80=99s capital, I=E2=80=99d s=
uggest devouring Leigh Ann=E2=80=99s two masterstrokes,

 style=3D"margin:0;margin-bottom:0px;">Indeed, industries don=E2=80=99t rea=

he drama=E2=80=94or the markets=E2=80=94into action. That=E2=80=99s a truth=

the mirthful narrating fairy in
<em>A Midsummer Night=E2=80=99s Dream</em>.) Anyway, without getting unnece=
